name: Lasalle Bus Svc Inc
notes: NY DOS entity confirmed: Lasalle Bus Service, Inc., DOS ID 610142, filed 02/21/1980, Domestic Business Corporation, CEO Joseph Fazzia, principal address 1 Coffey St, Brooklyn, NY 11231; status Active (per DOS bizprofile mirror as of 10/14/2025; biennial statement past due). No standalone FMCSA SAFER record found under 'Lasalle Bus Svc' or 'Lasalle Bus Service' (no keyword matches). Lasalle shares its 1 Coffey St address with Jofaz Transportation Inc (USDOT 526482, MC-166635, 485 power units, 366 drivers, Active interstate authorized for-hire passenger carrier, owner Joseph Fazzia) - the same principal/family operates both; LaSalle may operate under Jofaz's USDOT or as an intrastate-only sister entity. D&B lists 20 employees, ~$670K revenue, incorporated 1980. NLRB case 29-CA-029991 references LaSalle Bus Service Inc.

name: Brandywine Transportation Inc
inc_date: 1993 (approx., per ASTP press release stating 30 years operating as of Sept 2023); PA DOS LEI registration shows registration date 2017-04-19
officers: unknown (acquired by Krise Transportation / American Student Transportation Partners on 09/26/2023)
entity_status: Lapsed (per LEI as of 08/04/2023); company operations acquired by ASTP/Krise in Sept 2023
registry_source: PA Department of State (entity ref 2930391 per LEI Bloomberg)
notes: Brandywine Transportation Inc and a related entity Brandywine Lehigh Transportation LLC (USDOT 2455417, in business since 11/20/2013) at the same 595 State St, Mertztown, PA 19539 address. Direct SAFER query of USDOT 2455417 returns 'INACTIVE in the SAFER database' - consistent with ASTP press release that Brandywine Transportation Inc's ~300 routes/vehicles were acquired by Krise Transportation (an ASTP/Access Holdings portfolio company) on 09/26/2023 and merged into Krise operations. Per ASTP, Brandywine had been operating for 30 years (founded ~1993) and was a leading provider of student transportation in eastern PA. Brandywine Bus Sales LLC (USDOT 2180494, Reading PA) is a related sister entity (still active, 2 power units, 2 drivers, passenger interstate). PA DOS LEI shows 'Brandywine Transportation Inc' registered 2017-04-19 with status LAPSED - this may be a re-registration/foreign qualification. Active fleet at time of acquisition: 300+ buses; current standalone fleet effectively zero post-acquisition (operations folded into Krise).
